creator: vendion@gmail.com
text:
That is odd, it builds fine for me locally

/usr/home/vendion/freebsd-ports/shells/elvish> doas make package

===>  Staging for elvish-0.13
===>   Generating temporary packing list
for t in github.com/elves/elvish; do  dst=$(echo ${t} |  /usr/bin/sed -Ee 's/^[^:]*:([^:]+).*$/\1/' -e 's/^\.$/elvish/');  src=$(/usr/bin/basename ${dst});  case ${dst} in  /*) dst=/usr/home/vendion/freebsd-ports/shells/elvish/work/stage${dst}; /bin/mkdir -p $(/usr/bin/dirname ${dst}) ;;  *) dst=/usr/home/vendion/freebsd-ports/shells/elvish/work/stage/usr/local/bin/${src} ;;  esac;  echo "===>  Installing ${src} as ${dst}";  install  -s -m 555 /usr/home/vendion/freebsd-ports/shells/elvish/work/bin/${src} ${dst};  done
===>  Installing elvish as /usr/home/vendion/freebsd-ports/shells/elvish/work/stage/usr/local/bin/elvish
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
===>  Building package for elvish-0.13

I even installed it in a test jail with `make install` without any issues

/usr/home/vendion/freebsd-ports/shells/elvish> pkg info elvish
elvish-0.13
Name           : elvish
Version        : 0.13
Installed on   : Thu Jan  2 18:05:19 2020 EST
Origin         : shells/elvish
Architecture   : FreeBSD:12:amd64

The error you got looks like a network issue though
